macaroni-with-chorizo-recipe-comedera.name: Macaroni With Chorizo: Recipe

ingredients.item: 200 gr de chorizo (asturiano de preferencia, picante o dulce)
150 gr de queso en polvo o rallado

instructions: To start with, we'll get a big pot. We will warm up abundant fresh water with an oil chorrit (computing far more water than how much macaroni you will cook).
When the water's hot, pour the macaroni with a pint of salt. Meg and let them be cooked for as long as indicated by the manufacturer about the packaging (but should not exceed 12 minutes).
The following will be to purify the oven at 220 degrees. If the oven has a "gratified" or "grill" feature, we will activate it.
Mientras que los macarrones se cocinan, podemos aprovechar el tiempo para pelar la cebolla y los dientes de ajo. Luego, hay que picarlos menudamente.
In the case of the chorizo, we're also going to mince them into pieces.

Then we will warm up a frying pan (big enough to contain all the ingredients) and quickly cook chorizo pieces. We'll leave them with only a few minutes to seal and release some fat. After this time, we'll get the scuba with a drainer and put them aside.

In the fat that remains in the frying pan, we will fry the onion and garlic minced. We'll let them cook for 3 minutes, constantly stirring, and after this time, we'll add the fried tomato, a pint of sugar and we'll get back the chorizo.
Cocinaremos todo junto durante 5 minutos, apagaremos y retiraremos del calor.
When the cooking time of macaroni has been completed, they have to be drained. To continue, we will add them to the frying pan with the salsa and we will mix everything well.
To continue, we will need a suitable oven bowl, big enough to contain all the dough and salsa. We will check the contents of the frying pan and place them with a spoon or kitchen spatula.
Now we're gonna sprinkle the macaroni with the frosted cheese powder. We'll try to put a thin cape above all preparations.
Take the oven and plate for 10 minutes or till you see that the cheese's ready (golden). It's important that you monitor cooking constantly.
Saca los macarrones del horno y sirve calientes.
You can sprinkle them with more cheese.)

macaroni-with-roquefort-sauce-argiro.name: Macaroni With Roquefort Sauce

ingredients.item: 100 greme light milk or ebony milk
100 greme light milk or ebony milk

instructions: Before starting the easy pasta with rockfort, clean the broccoli and heat it for 3 minutes in salted water. Put it away.
Heat the olive oil in a deep pan.
In low heat sauté the fresh versions and leads for 6–7, soften without color.
Add the milk, rockfort and anthroat.
Try if you need salt and rub a lot of pepper.
Stir to melt the cheeses and always in low heat, let it boil.
Add the hot broccoli.
Meanwhile, boil the pasta in a pot with salted water.
As the pasta drips, with the tweezer, add them to the rockfort sauce.
Mix quickly and serve the pasta with the rich creamy sauce immediately.

macedonian-polyphylla-helios-vergina-or-.name: Macedonian Polyphylla (helios Vergina Or Pseudofoliata)

ingredients.item: 1/4 cup natural oil or vegetable cooking fat melted and cold
1 3/4 cup of fluffy water about (as much as lifts)
4 tablespoon butter soft at room temperature (not melted)
Some extra flour for opening the leaf
1/4 cup natural oil or vegetable cooking fat melted and cold
1 3/4 cup of fluffy water about (as much as lifts)
4 tablespoon butter soft at room temperature (not melted)
Some extra flour for opening the leaf

instructions: In order to make this homemade leaf that is like a bagel, first add the flour, oil, vinegar, salt and add water, stirring until dough is formed.
The dough must be malleable and not stick to the hands. We knead it for a few minutes.
Leave the dough covered for 20 minutes.
Then, we divide it into two similar places.
Open each piece of dough in a sheet with a diameter of 35 cm.
Place a dish with a diameter of 15 million round in the center of the opened leaf.
With a sharp knife cut the leaf radially from the plate to the edges in 12 rays, forming triangle pieces. Remove the plate.
With a brush, brush the whole surface of the leaf with soft vegetable butter.
One strip is turned over to the circle that marked the dish in the center of the leaf (that is, fold it into the center of the leaf the manly sides).
After closing all the strips, turn the dough over to a floured plate.
We do the same process as the second piece of dough for the second sheet.
Leave for 30 minutes at least in the refrigerator to freeze the butter and make layers. In other words, each sheet will consist of 12 layers at the end.
Open two large and thin leaves and allow them to dry a bit.
We grease a shallow baking pan for pie with a diameter of 42cm.
Spread the first leaf on the baking pan slightly strained, with folds (for a crisper result).
See that the leaf is a little prominent from the walls of the baking pan.
Pour the filling into a thin layer.
Cover with the second sheet slightly strained, wrinkled with many aspects.
Turn the two leaf compounds onto the pie or turn to a coth.
Gently apply the surface(s) with some oil.
Drizzle with some water.
Bake (according to the instructions of each recipe for pie) in general, for about 1 hour in a well preheated oven at 170oC until well golden.
The result of this leaf is something between rustic and thin sfoliates that shatter.

macedonian-vegetable-pie-with-mushrooms-.name: Macedonian Vegetable Pie With Mushrooms

ingredients.item: 1/2 cup natural cooking fat at room temperature
A little flour (for opening the leaf)
1/2 cup natural cooking fat at room temperature
A little flour (for opening the leaf)

instructions: For the delicious vegetarian pie with mushrooms and homemade leaf, add the flour, water, vinegar and salt first.
Ferment until the dough becomes smooth, elastic and supple.
Cover and rest for 30 minutes.
Make it into a long cane roll and divide it into 10 pieces of the same size.
Open each piece of dough on a thick sheet, spread with soft butter and stick the leaves together.
So now we have five fat, double as sandwiches, leaves, which in the middle we rubbed with butter.
Put them on a tray, cover and freeze for about 40 minutes, until the butter freezes in between.
On a floured surface, sprinkle with flour whenever necessary, open each double card in very thin, as thin as possible.
In the end, we'll have five very thin and big leaves.
Allow the leaves to dry lightly on the work bench.
Don't worry if they get a little dry, the pie will get better.

make-a-delicious-chipotle-chicken-burrit.name: Make A Delicious Chipotle Chicken Burrito
make-a-delicious-chipotle-chicken-burrit.original_name: Haz un rico burrito de pollo al chipotle

ingredients.item: 500 gr de pechugas de pollo desmenuzadas

instructions: In a large frying pan, heats up the vegetable oil and pits the onion and garlic till they are golden. Add pitted chicken breasts and paddle for a few minutes. Then add adobo chipots (you can mingle them or leave them as you prefer) and cook with medium heat for 5-7 minutes till the chicken absorbs the smoked taste of the chipotle. Retirement of salt and pepper to taste.
Warm the flour tortillas into a frying pan or comal to make them soft and flexible.

Put an omelette onto a flat surface and put a layer of refried beans at the centre. Add a portion of baked white rice, a good quantity of chicken to chipotle, acid cream and grated cheese. If you prefer, add minced lettuce to give them freshness.
Fold the sides of the omelette into the centre and then roll with care and make sure that the pilling remains well closed inside the omelette.
For an extra touch, you can heat up the burrito wrapped with an iron or frying pan for about 3 minutes on each side, till the omelette's golden and crispy.

mango-avocado-taco-cups.name: Mango Avocado Taco Cups
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375ºF (190ºC). Generously coat a 12-cup muffin tin with nonstick spray.
Stack the tortillas and cut off the edges so the tortillas are square. Then, quarter the squares so you have 12 small tortilla pieces.
Press a tortilla square into each cup of the prepared muffin tin.
Bake for about 10 minutes, until the edges of the tortillas are golden brown. Let cool for 5 minutes.
Fill each cup with 1 tablespoon of avocado and 1 tablespoon of mango and top with 1 teaspoon of salsa verde. Garnish with cilantro
Enjoy!

maple-glazed-salmon.name: Maple-glazed Salmon
instructions: For the salmon, heat vegetable oil on medium-high in a cast-iron skillet.
For the broccoli, fill a medium pot halfway with water. Add a dash of salt and start boiling water.
In the meantime, whisk together maple syrup, orange juice, soy sauce, garlic, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl.
Set aside 2 tablespoons for topping later.
Place salmon fillets inside the bowl and make sure each side is covered with sauce.
Sear the salmon 2-3 minutes on each side.
Brush the tops with the sauce set aside.
With the pot of water boiling, add the broccoli and cover lid. Blanch for 2 minutes.
Drain under cold water to stop the cooking.
In the drained pot of broccoli, stir in butter, soy sauce, red pepper flakes, some lemon zest, and garlic on low heat. Mix until broccoli is well-coated.
On each plate, serve a filet of salmon and scoop of broccoli.
Top with reserved marinade and sprinkle parsley for garnish.
Enjoy!

maple-roasted-chicken-thighs.name: Maple-roasted Chicken Thighs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a 10x15-inch baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Whisk maple syrup, 1 teaspoon olive oil, thyme, ¼ teaspoon salt, and ¼ teaspoon black pepper together in a small bowl until well combined. Set aside.
Toss sweet potatoes, Brussels sprouts, 2 teaspoons olive oil, ¼ teaspoon salt, and ¼ teaspoon black pepper together in a large bowl until evenly coated. Set aside.

Brush chicken with remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil; season with remaining ¼ teaspoon salt and ¼ teaspoon black pepper. Arrange chicken, skin-sides down, in center of the prepared baking sheet. Arrange sweet potato mixture around chicken.
Roast in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Flip chicken; brush chicken, sweet potatoes, and Brussels sprouts with maple syrup mixture.

Continue roasting until sweet potatoes tender and chicken is no longer pink in centers and the juices run clear, about 15 minutes more. An instant-read thermometer inserted near but not touching bones should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).
Sprinkle with pecans and cranberries; serve.

marinated-lemon-tarragon-cauliflower-sal.name: Marinated Lemon-tarragon Cauliflower Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Whisk lemon zest and juice, Dijon mustard, chopped tarragon, honey, salt, and pepper together in a small bowl. Pour in olive oil slowly, whisking until marinade emulsified; set aside.

Bring a medium pot of water to a boil, and working in batches, blanch the cauliflower until just tender, about 2 minutes. Drain and transfer to a large resealable plastic bag. Add marinade to the bag, seal tightly, and massage the florets until all are covered with the marinade. Chill in the fridge for 4 hours. Overnight is even better.
Remove cauliflower from the bag, place in a large bowl, and add apple, Cheddar cheese, cucumber, celery, and red onion, tossing gently to combine. Garnish with tarragon leaves and serve.

marry-me-chicken.name: Marry Me Chicken
instructions: Place chicken breasts on a flat work surface. Slice horizontally through the middle, being careful not to cut all the way through to the other side. Open the 2 sides and spread them out like an open book to butterfly.
Melt butter in a large, oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic, oregano, thyme. Sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add chicken and cook until golden brown but not fully cooked, 3 to 4 minutes per side.
Pour 1/4 cup chicken broth into the skillet and bake in the preheated oven until chicken is no longer pink in the centers and juices run clear, about 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, place bacon in a large skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels and let cool enough to handle, about 5 minutes; chop.

At the same time, bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook angel hair pasta in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, 4 to 5 minutes. Drain and keep warm.
Remove skillet from the oven and transfer chicken to a plate, reserving juices in the skillet. Keep chicken warm and place skillet on the stovetop.
Whisk flour into the skillet over medium heat. Add remaining chicken broth, Parmesan cheese, and whipping cream. Whisk until combined.
Add sun-dried tomatoes, red pepper flakes, and salt. Add bacon and chicken back into the skillet.
Serve on top of hot cooked pasta.

mashed-kohlrabi-with-brown-butter.name: Mashed Kohlrabi With Brown Butter
instructions: Heat butter in a small saucepan over medium. Cook hazelnuts until butter foams, then browns, about 5 minutes. Add thyme sprigs and cook until crisp, about 30 seconds. Immediately transfer to a bowl; spoon out nuts and coarsely chop.

Meanwhile, place potatoes in a large pot and pour in cold water to cover by 1". Season with salt; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until very tender, 10–12 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl. Return water to a simmer; cook kohlrabies until tender, 12–14 minutes. Drain and add to bowl with potatoes.
Heat cream in a small saucepan over medium until warm.

Pass potatoes and kohlrabies through potato ricer or food mill into a large bowl (alternatively, you can also use a masher). Stir in brown butter and warm cream; season with salt. Top mash with hazelnuts and crumble fried thyme over.

matzo-kimchi-pancakes.name: Matzo-kimchi Pancakes
instructions: Mix matzo and kimchi juice in a small bowl and let sit 8 minutes. Pour off excess liquid and mix in scallions, kimchi, onion, potato starch, salt, and sugar.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium-high. Add half of batter to skillet and flatten into a thin pancake; cook until golden brown and crisp on both sides, about 4 minutes total. Transfer to a plate. Repeat with another 1 Tbsp. oil and remaining batter.

meatballs-with-tomato-sauce-and-cheddar-.name: Meatballs With Tomato Sauce And Cheddar Cheese
meatballs-with-tomato-sauce-and-cheddar-.original_name: Tomato Sauced And Kasar Cheese Meatballs
instructions: 1. Reindeed into a deep container onion, garlic, mink, salt, spices, and enough to add the galeta flour and thoroughly knead.
2. Cover over with stretch film and listen to at least 2-3 hours.
3. Give your desired meatballs.
4. Take the sunflower oil into a pan and bite.
5. Lighten meatballs.
6. Reject tomatoes in a separate place.
7. Add 1 tablespoon of sunflower oil to another pan and heat it.
8. Add tomatoes and tomato paste on the middle fire to 3-4 minutes.
9. Add sugar, salt and pepper and get from the stove.
10. Go on the meatballs in the sauce moth.
11. 11. Add 2-3 spike peppers on it.
12. Bake for 10 minutes in the oven set to 180-200 degrees pre-heated.
12. August Then add the grated cheese and cook it in the oven until the cheese is melted.
14 July Do not forget to browse the recipe of delicious mother meatballs with video expression.

meaty-pumpkin-lezzet.name: Meaty Pumpkin
instructions: 1. Kü and roast the onion you eat from olive oil to pink.
2. Bake about 40 - 45 minutes until the lamb meat, salt, pepper and broth is softened.
3. You eat and cook for 30 minutes.
4. S&uuml with fine chopped parsley; warm service.

meftune-dinner-lezzet.name: Meftune Dinner
instructions: 1. Meat washed and rubbed with salt and broadcast on the bottom of the pan.
2. 2 tablespoons of sum 1 cup of water and leave for 15 minutes.
3. Dismantle a thin tulbent.
4. Peel the shells of eggplants.
5. Divide the neck in the tweezers and chop small.
6. Bake in salted water.
7. Peel the shells of tomatoes and chop them in the form of cube.
8.   Place the vegetables that you eat on the meat in the pot.
9.  Sumak suyunu ilave edip tuz ve pul biber serpin.
10. Cook the cover off until meats soften in medium fire.
11. 11. Serve meftune dish hot.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

melon-salad-with-ham-and-mozzarella-tele.name: Melon Salad With Ham And Mozzarella
melon-salad-with-ham-and-mozzarella-tele.original_name: Salada de meloa com presunto e mozarela

ingredients.item: Mint and basil leaves to decorate

instructions: Cut the melons in half, eliminate the seeds and remove balls with a medium Parisian spoon. Mix them with the mozzarella balls and the chopped basil. Season with salt, oil and vinegar and stir.
Fill the barks of the melons with the previous mixture, intercalating with the slices of rolled ham. Sprinkle with black sesame seeds, decorate with mint stems and basil and serve.

micahs-4-12-alarm-chili.name: Micah's 4 1/2-alarm Chili
instructions: Combine ground beef and onion in a large skillet over medium heat; cook and stir until browned, 5 to 8 minutes. Pour off excess grease.
Place bacon in a large skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain and cut into pieces.

Combine beef mixture, bacon, kidney beans, baked beans, tomatoes, brown sugar, barbeque rub, chili powder, hot sauce, and garlic powder in a large pot. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring every 30 minutes, until bubbling, 2 to 3 hours. Remove chili from heat and let cool, about 30 minutes.
Refrigerate chili, 8 hours to overnight.
Reheat chili over low heat, stirring every 30 minutes, for at least 4 hours before serving.

microwave-4-minute-bbq-chicken-nachos.name: Microwave 4-minute Bbq Chicken Nachos
instructions: Mix the chicken with the barbecue sauce, then spread evenly over a bed of tortilla chips.
Spread the pico de gallo, cheese, and green onions evenly on top, then microwave for about 1-3 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Dollop with some guacamole and sour cream, then serve.
Enjoy!

microwave-pastry-cream-pequerecetas.name: Microwave Pastry Cream

ingredients.item: Lemon skin (optional but gives a very good touch)

instructions: It starts with 4 yolks with 100 g of sugar bawling. No need to wear a mixer with a few spare hand rods.
When you see that the sugar has been dissolved a little and the mixture's more clear, add the 40 g of maicene and remove well until they are clumsy.
It then gradually incorporates the 500 million whole milk while continuing to mix so that a uniform texture remains.
Also add the teaspoon of vanilla essence and, if you wish, a piece of lemon skin to give that classic smell.

Put the bowl into the microwave at maximum power (about 800 W) for two minutes. Take them out and move them with the rods and put them back in another two minutes. It's important to remove between tanda and tanda so that the cream gets cooked evenly and doesn't form clumps.

When you get her out the second time, you'll see she's been pounding. Give the microwave one last minute and mix again. If you still get a little too clear, you can warm her up half a minute more but be careful that she's bad and you can get through.
Once ready, remove the lemon skin (if you have) and cover the surface with clear film, directly touching the cream to prevent them from becoming crusts.
Let them cool at room temperature and then put them in the refrigerator till they use them.

mile-high-chocolate-cake-with-vanilla-bu.name: Mile-high Chocolate Cake With Vanilla Buttercream
instructions: Butter three 8-inch-diameter cake pans with 1 1/2-inch-high sides. Line bottom of each pan with parchment paper round; butter parchment. Dust pans with flour; tap out excess. Whisk 1 1/4 cups hot water, cocoa powder, and sour cream in medium bowl until smooth; set aside until mixture is cool, 20 to 30 minutes.

Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 163°C. Sift next 4 ingredients into another medium bowl. Using electric mixer, beat butter and shortening in large bowl until well blended and smooth. Add both sugars; beat until light and fluffy, about 5 minutes. Add eggs 1 at a time, beating until well blended after each addition. Mix in vanilla. Add flour mixture in 3 additions alternately with cocoa mixture in 2 additions, beginning and ending with flour mixture and beating just until incorporated. Divide batter among prepared pans (about 2 3/4 cups batter for each) and smooth tops.

Bake cakes until tester inserted into center comes out clean, 50 to 55 minutes. Cool cakes in pans on racks 20 minutes. Run knife around sides of cakes to loosen. Invert cakes onto racks and cool completely. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Wrap in plastic and store at room temperature.
Combine egg whites and 1/3 cup sugar in large bowl of stand mixer fitted with whisk attachment; scrape in seeds from vanilla bean.

Combine remaining 1 1/3 cups sugar and 1/3 cup water in medium saucepan. Stir over medium heat until sugar dissolves. Attach candy thermometer to side of pan, making sure that bulb of thermometer is immersed in syrup. Increase heat; boil until temperature registers 114°C to 116°C (soft-ball stage), about 5 minutes. Immediately remove syrup from heat (use within 2 minutes).
Meanwhile, beat egg white mixture on medium speed until very soft peaks form (mixture will be slightly opaque).

Increase mixer speed to high and slowly pour hot syrup down side of bowl into egg white mixture in slow steady stream; beat until meringue forms stiff peaks. Cool meringue in bowl until lukewarm (instant-read thermometer will register 38°C), about 30 minutes. Do not beat.

Start beating meringue again on medium speed of stand mixer. Gradually add butter, 2 to 3 tablespoons at a time, beating constantly until absorbed before adding next addition. Continue beating until buttercream is smooth. (If buttercream looks broken or curdled, place mixer bowl with buttercream over medium heat on stove burner and whisk with large whisk for 5 to 10 seconds to warm mixture slightly, then remove from heat and whisk vigorously or attach bowl to stand mixer and beat mixture again on medium speed. Repeat warming and beating buttercream mixture as many times as needed until buttercream is smooth and no longer curdled.)

Using serrated knife, cut each cake in half horizontally, forming 6 cake layers. If necessary, trim any domed tops of cakes to form even layers. Place 1 cake layer on platter. Drop 3/4 cup buttercream by tablespoonfuls over top of cake layer, then spread evenly to edges with offset spatula. Top with second cake layer, then spread 3/4 cup buttercream over. Repeat with 3 more cake layers, spreading 3/4 cup buttercream over each and pressing slightly to adhere. Top with 6th cake layer (do not spread buttercream over top cake layer). Chill cake at least 1 hour.

Combine both chocolates in medium bowl. Bring cream and corn syrup to simmer in heavy saucepan. Pour hot cream mixture over chocolate; let stand 2 minutes. Whisk chocolate mixture until melted and smooth. Add butter; whisk until melted. Chill glaze until slightly thickened and glaze drips thickly when poured slowly from spoon, 30 to 45 minutes.

Spoon glaze around top edge of cake by teaspoonfuls, spacing drips up to 2 inches apart and allowing glaze to drip slowly down sides of cake. Spoon remaining glaze over top center of cake and smooth with offset spatula, covering top completely. Chill cake until glaze sets, at least 1 hour. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Tent with foil and keep chilled. Let cake stand at room temperature 1 hour before serving.

milk-free-egg-free-cotton-cake-recipe-le.name: Milk-free Egg-free Cotton Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 cup freshly squeezed orange suy  u

instructions: 1. Take dust sugar to a large mixing container.
2. U add orange juice and water to the car and add to the sugar melt
3. Continue mixing by adding liquid oil and orange peel grater.
4. Kabartma tozu ve vanilini ilave edin.
5. Unu controlled add smooth and get a fluid cake dough.
6. Pour pulp to oiled cake mold.
7. Öpreheated from 170 degrees to 35–40 minutes.
8. Kücontrol with test from the oven crack, after rest at room temperature, mold crack.
9. U you can sprinkle the powder sugar on the car or fortune with orange sauce.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

millie-pasquinellis-fried-chicken.name: Millie Pasquinelli's Fried Chicken
instructions: Mix flour, seasoned salt, garlic powder, salt, and pepper in a shallow plate or bowl. Place eggs in a separate shallow bowl.
Roll or shake chicken pieces in the flour mixture and place on a platter. Then dip each chicken piece in the egg and roll again in the flour mixture.
Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large skillet to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Fry coated chicken pieces in hot oil for about 5 minutes on each side. Cover skillet and cook on lower heat for about 10 minutes. Remove cover, turn up the heat, and fry for 5 minutes on each side to make chicken crispy. Chicken is done when it is no longer pink inside and its juices run clear. An instant-read thermometer inserted near the bone should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Drain fried chicken on paper towels and keep warm in an oven until ready to serve.

mistis-dried-herb-salad-seasoning.name: Misti's Dried Herb Salad Seasoning
instructions: Combine Parmesan cheese, parsley flakes, basil, chives, marjoram, paprika, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, and pepper in a small bowl; stir to blend evenly. Store in an airtight container.

moist-apple-cake.name: Moist Apple Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease and flour a 9x13-inch pan.
Sift flour, salt, cinnamon, and baking powder together; set aside.

Beat eggs and sugar together in a large bowl with an electric mixer on high speed until light in color, about 2 to 3 minutes; beat in oil until combined. Add flour mixture and mix well. Add vanilla and fold in apples and nuts. Pour cake batter into prepared pan.
Mix 4 teaspoons sugar with 1 teaspoon cinnamon in a small bowl; sprinkle over cake.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into center of the cake comes out clean, about 50 to 60 minutes.

moist-persimmon-bread.name: Moist Persimmon Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Stir sugar, wheat flour, all-purpose flour, oatmeal, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice, cloves, and baking soda together in a large bowl until well mixed. Set aside.
Stir persimmon pulp, applesauce, vegetable oil, and eggs until well blended. Combine the wet and dry ingredients, stirring until free of lumps. Divide batter between two prepared loaf pans.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the loaves comes out clean, about 1 hour.

mole-coloradito.name: Mole Coloradito

ingredients.item: 0.5 ceylon cinnamon stick or  0.75 teaspoon ground cinnamon
Grated piloncillo (unrefined whole cane sugar) or dark brown sugar

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 450°. Roast tomatoes, tomatillos, onion, and garlic on a rimmed baking sheet on upper rack until softened and browned in spots (vegetables should still hold their shape), 25–35 minutes. Let cool slightly. Cut the top off the garlic, exposing the cloves inside. Squeeze out roasted garlic cloves into a blender. Transfer remaining vegetables to blender and purée until smooth. Scrape into a medium bowl.

While the vegetables are roasting, toast ancho and guajillo chiles on a clean rimmed baking sheet on lower rack until guajillo chiles are slightly darker in spots, about 4 minutes. Let cool slightly, then transfer to a large bowl. Add raisins and 4 cups boiling water, cover with plastic wrap, and let sit 30 minutes.
Transfer chile mixture to blender (you don’t need to clean it); blend until thick and smooth.

As soon as chiles are out of the oven, toast sesame seeds on another rimmed baking sheet on lower rack until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Let cool. Grind in spice mill, shaking occasionally, to a powder. Be careful not to overgrind or you will make sesame paste. Transfer to a small bowl.

Very finely grind cinnamon, allspice, cloves, and cumin seeds in spice mill. Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high and cook spice mixture, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add vegetable purée and cook, stirring occasionally, until mixture thickens slightly, 5–7 minutes. Add chile purée and broth, season with salt, and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until mole is thickened to the consistency of heavy cream, 60–75 minutes.

Add sesame powder, chocolate, breadcrumbs, and piloncillo to mole and whisk until chocolate is melted and sesame seeds are incorporated. Continue cooking, whisking often to prevent mole from sticking to the bottom of the pot, until very thick and the consistency of marinara sauce, 30–35 minutes. Taste mole and season with salt as needed.

mommas-fresh-fig-preserves.name: Momma's Fresh Fig Preserves
instructions: Bring figs, sugar, lemon juice, ginger, cinnamon, vanilla, and salt to a simmer in a saucepan over medium heat; reduce heat and cook at a low simmer, stirring every 20 minutes, until reaches desired consistency, 3 to 4 hours.

Inspect 5 or 6 half pint-sized jars for cracks and rings for rust, discarding any defective ones. Immerse in simmering water until fig preserves are ready. Wash new, unused lids and rings in warm soapy water.

Pack fig preserves into hot, sterilized jars, filling to within ¼ inch of tops. Run a clean knife or thin spatula around insides of jars to remove any air bubbles. Wipe rims with a moist paper towel to remove any residue. Top with lids and screw rings on tightly.

Place a rack in bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water; bring to a boil and lower jars 2 inches apart into the boiling water using a holder. Pour in more boiling water to cover jars by at least 1 inch. Bring to a rolling boil, cover, and process for 10 minutes.
Remove jars from stockpot; rest, several inches apart, for 12 to 24 hours. Press center of each lid with a finger to ensure lid does not move up or down. Remove rings and store in a cool, dark area.

mormon-scalloped-potatoes.name: Mormon Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Place potatoes in a large saucepan and cover with water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until tender but not mushy, about 15 minutes. Drain, then cool. Cut potatoes into 1-inch thick slices.

Whisk soup, sour cream, green onions, and 1/2 cup melted butter in a bowl until thoroughly combined; whisk in Cheddar cheese. Combine corn flake crumbs and remaining 1/4 cup melted butter in a separate bowl.

Spread a thin layer of sour cream sauce in the bottom of a 9x13-inch glass baking dish. Spread a layer of potato slices over sauce, followed by a thick layer of sauce. Continue layering, ending with sauce. Sprinkle corn flake mixture over top of casserole.
Bake in the preheated oven until casserole is bubbling and topping is crisp, about 45 minutes.

moroccan-beef-and-lentil-stew.name: Moroccan Beef And Lentil Stew
instructions: Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add carrots, celery, and onion; cook until slightly softened, about 3 minutes. Stir in garlic and cook for 1 minute.

Add beef. Sprinkle salt, turmeric, onion powder, garlic powder, pepper, cinnamon, ginger, cumin, coriander, and allspice over beef and vegetables. Stir to mix. Continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until beef is browned, about 5 minutes.

Stir in tomato paste until combined and cook for 1 minute. Add beef broth, molasses, and bay leaves. Bring stew to a simmer. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook, stirring occasionally, until beef is tender, about 50 minutes.

Mix in lentils and dried apricots. Bring stew back to a simmer. Cover and cook on low, stirring occasionally, until lentils soften, about 15 minutes. Remove and discard bay leaves. Adjust salt and pepper; mix in fresh lemon juice just before serving.

moroccan-spiced-chicken-skewers.name: Moroccan-spiced Chicken Skewers

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken breast halves, cut into 1 1/2 inch cubes

instructions: Whisk olive oil, 1/4 cup mint, cilantro, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, honey, 1 1/2 teaspoon salt, 2 cloves garlic, paprika, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and cayenne in a large bowl. Reserve 1/4 cup marinade in a separate bowl.

Place chicken in a large resealable plastic bag. Pour marinade over chicken. Press air out of the bag and seal tightly. Turn the bag to distribute the marinade. Place in a bowl and refrigerate for 5 hours.
Whisk yogurt, 1/2 cup lemon juice, 1/4 cup mint, 2 cloves garlic, lemon zest, and 1 teaspoon salt together in a bowl to make sauce. Cover and place in the refrigerator.
Toss green bell peppers and red onion in the reserved 1/4 cup marinade. Remove chicken from the bag and discard all marinade. Thread chicken, peppers, and onion alternately onto skewers.

Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate. Arrange skewers on the grill. Close lid and cook, turning once or twice, until chicken is firm to the touch, 8 to 10 minutes. Remove from grill and let stand for 2 to 3 minutes. Serve with cold sauce.

mushroom-menemen-recipe-lezzet.name: Mushroom Menemen Recipe
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in the pan, add peppers, and put it into lightly.
2. Add the mushrooms and cook until the water is shaken & greasy.
3. Add tomatoes, cook aka&ccedil until the sauce consistency area; min.
4. Add salt and spices.
5. Crop eggs, wraps & varnish; stir without diffusion.
6. Cook the eggs until you get the desired consistency and serve hot.

mussels-with-rice-argiro.name: Mussels With Rice
instructions: If we do it with frozen
We leave the bag with the mussels in the fridge for the night to thaw properly.
I use fresh ones here.
First, clean the mussels.
Remove their whiskers, clean the shell with a brush and wash them very well.
Whatever remains open after this process, we throw away.
We'll also throw away everything that remains closed after boiling.
Place them in a pot and add the water, wine, and cover with the lid.
Set them on high heat for a few minutes, 3 ́-4`, – shake the pot once or two to make it easy to open.
We must not pass them because they lose their taste they harden and shrink.
In a pot heat the olive oil and add the onion.
Add the brown rice and mix.
Add 2 cups of steamed juice and simmer the rice for 10 minutes, absorb the liquids, with the pot half covered.
Add all other ingredients and simmer for 15 minutes extra.
Remove the mussel flesh and add it to the rice (hold some shell for garnishing).
Mix well to warm the mussels.
We serve.

mustard-seed-crusted-prime-rib-roast-wit.name: Mustard-seed-crusted Prime Rib Roast With Dijon Créme Fraîche And Roasted Balsamic Onions

ingredients.prep: cut into 3/4-inch wedges with some core attached

instructions: Using electric mixer, beat crème fraîche and cream in medium bowl to firm peaks. Fold in horseradish and 1/3 cup mustard. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Cover and chill. DO AHEAD Can be made 8 hours ahead. Keep chilled. Rewhisk before serving.

Preheat oven to 232°C. Toss onions, shallots, vinegar, oil, and 1 1/2 teaspoons coarse salt in large bowl. Sprinkle roast lightly with coarse salt and generously with pepper. Stir 2/3 cup mustard and garlic in small bowl; rub over roast. Place roast, bone side down, in roasting pan. Sprinkle mustard seeds over, pressing to adhere. Roast 20 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 177°C.
Arrange onion mixture around roast. Return to oven; roast until instant-read thermometer inserted into center registers 49°C, stirring onion mixture occasionally, about 2 1/4 hours for medium-rare.

Transfer roast to work surface. Tent with foil; let rest 30 minutes. If necessary, increase oven temperature to 232°C and return onion mixture to roasting pan and roast until deep brown and very tender, about 10 minutes. Using slotted spoon, transfer onion mixture to medium bowl.

Place roasting pan over 2 burners on medium-high heat. Add brandy; stir 30 seconds. Whisk in broth and remaining 1 teaspoon mustard; boil until reduced to 1 1/4 cups jus, stirring occasionally, about 10 minutes. Season jus with salt and pepper.
Slice roast; arrange on platter. Spoon onions around roast. Sprinkle parsley over. Pass Dijon crème fraîche and jus alongside.
1. Cut between the bones. This method yields generous portions and makes for a dramatic-looking presentation.
2. Cut the rack off the meat, working as close to the bone as possible. You'll have a boneless roast that can be cut into thin or thick slices.

mykonos-honey-pie-argiro.name: Mykonos Honey Pie

ingredients.item: 1 kg of flour inflated by itself
A little extra flour (for opening the leaf)
1 kg of flour inflated by itself
A little extra flour (for opening the leaf)

instructions: For Mykonos honey pie with a rustic leaf, mix all the ingredients of the dough first and add the water a little bit to make a soft dough. Almost like it sticks to our hands.
Cover and set aside to rest for 30 minutes.

10-minute-lamb-and-asparagus-stir-fry.name: 10-minute Lamb And Asparagus Stir-fry

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: woody ends trimmed, sliced on a diagonal  0.5" thick

ingredients.item: Finely chopped dill fronds and tender stems‚ plus more chopped fronds for serving

instructions: Heat a dry large cast-iron skillet over medium-high until beginning to smoke. Pour in 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil, then add 1 lb. ground lamb and use a wooden spoon or heatproof spatula to press meat into a thin layer. Sprinkle with 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, season with freshly ground black pepper, and scatter one 2" piece ginger, peeled, finely chopped, over. Cook, undisturbed, until lamb is deeply browned underneath, about 5 minutes.

Break up meat into bite-size pieces, then add 6 scallions, thinly sliced, 1 lb. asparagus, woody ends trimmed, sliced on a diagonal ½" thick, and ½ cup finely chopped dill fronds and tender stems. Season with salt and pepper. Cook, tossing often, until lamb is cooked through and asparagus is bright green and just crisp-tender, about 2 minutes (it’s okay if asparagus is still a little crunchy—it will continue to soften off the heat). Taste and add more salt and pepper if needed. Scatter finely grated zest of ½ lemon over.
Divide stir-fry among bowls or plates and top with more dill. Serve with lemon wedges for squeezing over.

15-minute-chicken-paillards.name: 15-minute Chicken Paillards
instructions: Pound chicken between 2 sheets of plastic wrap to ¼" thick; season with salt and pepper. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in large skillet over high. Carefully place 1 chicken breast in skillet (laying it away from you) and cook until golden brown and nearly cooked through, about 3 minutes. Turn and cook until cooked through, about 1 minute (second side will not brown). Transfer to a large plate. Repeat with 1 Tbsp. oil and remaining cutlet. Let the cutlets rest while you make the slaw.
Toss cabbage, onion, and red pepper flakes in a medium bowl; season with salt. Drizzle in vinegar and remaining 3 Tbsp. oil and toss again.
Top cutlets with slaw.
